Source: AgentCore Developer Guide
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/what-is-bedrock-agentcore.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Overview

## Core Definition
Agentic platform for building, deploying, and operating agents securely at scale using any framework and foundation model.

## Key Services
1. Runtime — Serverless environment with session isolation, multi-agent support
2. Memory — Short-term and long-term memory across sessions, shared memory stores
3. Gateway — MCP-compatible tool conversion, single endpoint access
4. Identity — Secure agent identity (Cognito, Okta, Azure Entra ID, Auth0)
5. Code Interpreter — Sandboxed Python, JavaScript, TypeScript execution
6. Browser Tool — Cloud-based browser runtime (Playwright, BrowserUse)
7. Observability — OpenTelemetry tracing, CloudWatch integration
8. Evaluations — Automated agent assessment and monitoring
9. Policy Engine — Cedar-based deterministic control over agent behavior

## Framework Support
CrewAI, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, Strands Agents

## Model Support
Any foundation model: Anthropic Claude, Amazon Nova, Meta Llama, Mistral, OpenAI, Google Gemini

## Protocol Support
MCP (Model Context Protocol), A2A protocol

## Architecture
Serverless, security-first, framework-agnostic, consumption-based pricing
